title: Nezumi Steals Nami’s Savings
description: On pages 1–4, nezumi steals nami’s savings focuses on Nami, Arlong, Marine Captain Nezumi, Nojiko as nami’s stolen savings and Arlong’s betrayal push Cocoyashi Village into open rebellion, forcing her to ask Luffy for help.
scene: On pages 1–4, nezumi steals nami’s savings focuses on Nami, Arlong, Marine Captain Nezumi, Nojiko as nami’s stolen savings and Arlong’s betrayal push Cocoyashi Village into open rebellion, forcing her to ask Luffy for help.

dialogue.speaker: Marine Captain Nezumi
dialogue.text: Chichichi! I can't stop laughing!

dialogue.speaker: Marine Captain Nezumi
dialogue.text: A whopping 93 million belli!

dialogue.speaker: Marine Captain Nezumi
dialogue.text: to think we can pocket 30% of this for ourselves...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: How Wonderful!

dialogue.speaker: Marine Captain Nezumi
dialogue.text: But Captain... some of these bills are all tattered and stained with blood and mud...

dialogue.speaker: Marine Captain Nezumi
dialogue.text: Chichichi... Money is money.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: that naive little girl seriously believed she could buy back her freedom,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: And spent 8 whole years saving up all this much, bit by bit!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: How stupid could she be! CHICHICH!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Shaha haha!

dialogue.speaker: Marine Captain Nezumi
dialogue.text: The Marines stole your money...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That's quite unfortunate of you.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: But a promise is a promise.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: If you can't pay me 100 million belli,

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: I can't just return your village back to you.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: You vile monster...!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: But you know, it's only 100 million belli.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: All you need to do is save up that much again!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: You're not going to run away, are you?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Just keep in mind that if you do...

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyashi villagers
dialogue.text: I'll have everyone in Cocoyashi Village killed because of you...

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyashi villagers
dialogue.text: We knew all along, Nami...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: But we feared that if you knew that we knew,

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyashi villagers
dialogue.text: Our hopes would pressure you into staying if you ever wanted to run away from it all.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: That's why we pret- ended not to know.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: What's wrong, Nami? Are you going to run away?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Shaha haha!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: That does it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: arm your- selves, for it's time to fight!

dialogue.speaker: Genzo
dialogue.text: Gen! Everyone! Please...!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Please don't be rash...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: You can't die...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Because that'll be the end of everything!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Uoooooohhh!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: We have to live on no matter what...!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Otherwise it'll all be over!

summary: This part turns Nami’s private suffering into an open crisis, ending with the emotional choice to rely on Luffy.
